title: Add Wikimind to learn
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds [Wikimind](https://chpalitom09-bot.github.io/Wikimind-5/) to learn
- Uses Google Translate to write messages to you.

Fixes #11704

gist.headline: Wikimind joins the greenhouse
gist.blurb: A new community app called Wikimind just sprouted in our showcase! It uses Google Translate to help write messages and facilitate learning.
gist.summary: Added the community-built app Wikimind, a learning tool that integrates Google Translate for messaging, to the apps showcase.
gist.impact: Users can now explore Wikimind in the apps directory to see how it leverages translation for interactive learning.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee in a cozy digital greenhouse or library setting, interacting with a glowing book or retro monitor that displays translation symbols (like a globe or different language characters).
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the bee mascot wearing tiny reading glasses, hovering in a lush digital greenhouse where code-plants sprout from pots. She is looking at a glowing retro computer monitor displaying a pixelated globe and translation symbols. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky pixels, warm lighting, lo-fi aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Emotionally warm, nostalgic but beautiful.
